name: Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE Tax API
what_it_does: Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE REST API for enterprise global tax compliance and provision platform. Enables AI agents to manage indirect tax calculation for sales, purchase, and VAT transactions, handle global tax compliance workflow automation, access transfer pricing documentation and data management, retrieve tax provision and ASC 740 reporting data, manage corporate income tax return preparation data, handle tax research and regulation content access, access country-by-country reporting (CbCR) data management, retrieve tax analytics and effective tax rate reporting, manage digital services tax and new tax regulation compliance, and integrate global tax data with ERP, financial consolidation, and compliance platforms.
use_cases: Calculating real-time global indirect tax from ERP order processing agents
Managing tax provision data from corporate tax compliance agents
Accessing transfer pricing documentation from global tax agents
Integrating tax calculation with SAP from enterprise finance agents
not_for: Small business tax filing without enterprise global tax compliance requirements
Simple US sales tax without multi-country and complex tax provision needs
Consumer tax software without enterprise ERP integration
best_when: A multinational enterprise using ONESOURCE wants AI agents to automate global indirect tax calculation, tax provision, transfer pricing documentation, CbCR compliance, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: TAX+COMPLIANCE RISK: Global tax automation must maintain current tax rule content across all jurisdictions — rule changes in any country can cause calculation errors with audit liability. Transfer pricing automation touches complex regulatory requirements that require human tax expert oversight.

auth.notes: ONESOURCE uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Thomson Reuters account credentials with tax product scopes. Enterprise API documentation via Thomson Reuters developer resources. No native webhooks. SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft Dynamics ERP integrations. Multiple ONESOURCE products (Indirect Tax, Income Tax, Transfer Pricing) have separate APIs.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; per-product pricing for indirect tax, income tax, transfer pricing
pricing.notes: Eagan, Minnesota. Thomson Reuters Corporation. Founded 1799 (as Thomson). ONESOURCE platform launched 1990s. $1.5B+ tax segment revenue. Used by 90% of Fortune 100 for tax compliance. Global tax content covering 190+ countries. Strong transfer pricing, indirect tax, and tax provision capabilities. Competes with Vertex and Avalara for enterprise tax technology.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per subscription; ERP transaction processing optimized

known_agent_gotchas: TAX RISK: Global tax content updates — ONESOURCE must use current content; stale rates create calculation errors and audit liability
Multiple product APIs — Indirect Tax, Income Tax, Transfer Pricing, Tax Provision each have separate API surfaces
Limited public developer documentation — enterprise product with documentation via TR developer portal requiring license
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API requiring Thomson Reuters enterprise license
ERP connector licensing — SAP and Oracle connectors may require separate licensing from base ONESOURCE
Transfer pricing complexity — automated TP documentation requires human tax expert review; regulatory complexity is high
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise global tax. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Tax calculation and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global tax technology. SOC1, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Tax compliance and provision data.
